steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Auren Energia as of 2025-03-31
from decimal import Decimal
# Given values
assets = 52266696000.0
current_assets = 11093981000.0
cash = 6131027000.0
financial_apps = 31449000.0
disponibilidades = cash + financial_apps
noncurrent_assets = 41172715000.0
# liabilities
current_liabilities = 7643912000.0
noncurrent_liabilities = 30044036000.0
# debts
current_debt = 2438563000.0
noncurrent_debt = 23723201000.0
div_bruta = current_debt + noncurrent_debt
# equity
patrimonio_liq_consolidado = 14578748000.0
# parent equity (patrimonio liquido - participação não controladora)
patrimonio_liq_parent = 13251475000.0  # from 5.07 Patrimonio Liquido - Saldos Finais ÚLTIMO
participacao_nc = 1327231000.0
# revenues and results
# Quarter (2025 Q1)
rev_q1_2025 = 2952303000.0
gross_q1_2025 = 836269000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 991459000.0
net_q1_2025 = 53997000.0
net_parent_q1_2025 = 8496000.0
# Quarter (2024 Q1)
rev_q1_2024 = 1397531000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 282893000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 499841000.0
net_q1_2024 = 253618000.0
net_parent_q1_2024 = 253618000.0
# Annual 2024 (calendar year)
rev_2024 = 8059951000.0
gross_2024 = 1429003000.0
ebit_2024 = 1291665000.0
net_2024 = 271869000.0
net_parent_2024 = 250938000.0
# Depreciation & amortization
da_q1_2025 = 390472000.0
da_q1_2024 = 158248000.0
da_2024 = 637363000.0
# other
receitas_12m = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_12m = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
# net income 12m consolidated and attributable
net_12m = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
net_parent_12m = net_parent_2024 + net_parent_q1_2025 - net_parent_q1_2024
# TTM gross
gross_12m = gross_2024 + gross_q1_2025 - gross_q1_2024
# D&A TTM
da_12m = da_2024 + da_q1_2025 - da_q1_2024
# EBITDA TTM
ebitda_12m = ebit_12m + da_12m
# Shares
total_shares = 1050378000
treasury = 5400000
outstanding = total_shares - treasury
price = 9.65
market_cap = price * outstanding
# Debt net
div_liquida = div_bruta - disponibilidades
# Enterprise value
ev = market_cap + div_liquida
# Ratios per share
lpa = net_parent_12m / outstanding if outstanding!=0 else 0
vpa = patrimonio_liq_parent / outstanding if outstanding!=0 else 0
rev_per_share = receitas_12m / outstanding
ebit_per_share = ebit_12m / outstanding
ebitda_per_share = ebitda_12m / outstanding
assets_per_share = assets / outstanding
cap_giro = current_assets - current_liabilities
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / outstanding
ativ_circ_liq = current_assets - disponibilidades  # chosen definition
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativ_circ_liq / outstanding
# Multiples
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share if ebit_per_share!=0 else None
psr = price / rev_per_share if rev_per_share!=0 else None
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share if assets_per_share!=0 else None
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ativ_circ_liq_per_share if ativ_circ_liq_per_share!=0 else None
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_12m if ebitda_12m!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_12m if ebit_12m!=0 else None
# Margins and returns
marg_bruta = (gross_12m / receitas_12m * 100) if receitas_12m!=0 else None
marg_ebit = (ebit_12m / receitas_12m * 100) if receitas_12m!=0 else None
marg_liquida = (net_12m / receitas_12m * 100) if receitas_12m!=0 else None
ebit_ativo = (ebit_12m / assets * 100) if assets!=0 else None
roic = (ebit_12m / (assets - ( (1307407000.0) ) - disponibilidades) * 100) if assets!=0 else None
# Note: Fornecedores current from ÚLTIMO
fornecedores = 1037407000.0
roic = (ebit_12m / (assets - fornecedores - disponibilidades) * 100) if (assets - fornecedores - disponibilidades)!=0 else None
roe = (net_parent_12m / patrimonio_liq_parent * 100) if patrimonio_liq_parent!=0 else None
liquidez_corr = current_assets / current_liabilities if current_liabilities!=0 else None
div_br_patrim = div_bruta / patrimonio_liq_consolidado if patrimonio_liq_consolidado!=0 else None
giro_ativos = receitas_12m / assets if assets!=0 else None
# Prepare results dictionary
results = {
    'Ativo': assets,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
    'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': div_liquida,
    'Patrim. Lq': patrimonio_liq_consolidado,
    'Receita Lida (12 meses)': receitas_12m,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_12m,
    'Lucro Lo (12 meses)': net_12m,
    'Receita Lida (3 meses)': rev_q1_2025,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_q1_2025,
    'Lucro Lo (3 meses)': net_q1_2025,
}
# But schema expects specific names
output = {
    'Ativo': assets,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
    'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
    'Dív. La': div_liquida
}
# Print detailed computed values for verification
print('computed values:')
print(f'disponibilidades = {disponibilidades}')
print(f'div_bruta = {div_bruta}')
print(f'div_liquida = {div_liquida}')
print(f'patrimonio_liq_consolidado = {patrimonio_liq_consolidado}')
print(f'receitas_12m = {receitas_12m}')
print(f'ebit_12m = {ebit_12m}')
print(f'net_12m = {net_12m}')
print(f'net_parent_12m = {net_parent_12m}')
print(f'gross_12m = {gross_12m}')
print(f'da_12m = {da_12m}')
print(f'ebitda_12m = {ebitda_12m}')
print(f'outstanding = {outstanding}')
print(f'market_cap = {market_cap}')
print(f'EV = {ev}')
print(f'LPA = {lpa}')
print(f'VPA = {vpa}')
print(f'PL = {pl}')
print(f'P/VP = {p_vp}')
print(f'P/EBIT = {p_ebit}')
print(f'PSR = {psr}')
print(f'P/Ativos = {p_ativos}')
print(f'P/Cap. Giro = {p_cap_giro}')
print(f'P/Ativ Circ Liq = {p_ativ_circ_liq}')
print(f'EV/EBITDA = {ev_ebitda}')
print(f'EV/EBIT = {ev_ebit}')
print(f'LPA (per share) = {lpa}')
print(f'VPA (per share) = {vpa}')
print(f'Marg. Bruta (%) = {marg_bruta}')
print(f'Marg. EBIT (%) = {marg_ebit}')
print(f'Marg. Liquida (%) = {marg_liquida}')
print(f'EBIT / Ativo (%) = {ebit_ativo}')
print(f'ROIC (%) = {roic}')
print(f'ROE (%) = {roe}')
print(f'Liquidez Corr = {liquidez_corr}')
print(f'Div Br/ Patrim = {div_br_patrim}')
print(f'Giro Ativos = {giro_ativos}')

# Build final structured list according to required indicator names in enumeration
indicators = []
# mapping consistent with enum list order
indicators_map = [
    ('Ativo', assets),
    ('Disponibilidades', disponibilidades),
    ('Ativo Circulante', current_assets),
    ('D\u00edv. Bruta', div_bruta),
    ('D\u00edv. L\u00edquida', div_liquida),
    ('Patrim. L\u00edq', patrimonio_liq_consolidado),
    ('Receita L\u00edquida (12 meses)', receitas_12m),
    ('EBIT (12 meses)', ebit_12m),
    ('Lucro L\u00edquido (12 meses)', net_12m),
    ('Receita L\u00edquida (3 meses)', rev_q1_2025),
    ('EBIT (3 meses)', ebit_q1_2025),
    ('Lucro L\u00edquido (3 meses)', net_q1_2025),
    ('P/L', pl if pl is not None else float('nan')),
    ('P/VP', p_vp if p_vp is not None else float('nan')),
    ('P/EBIT', p_ebit if p_ebit is not None else float('nan')),
    ('PSR', psr if psr is not None else float('nan')),
    ('P/Ativos', p_ativos if p_ativos is not None else float('nan')),
    ('P/Cap. Giro', p_cap_giro if p_cap_giro is not None else float('nan')),
    ('P/Ativ Circ Liq', p_ativ_circ_liq if p_ativ_circ_liq is not None else float('nan')),
    ('EV / EBITDA', ev_ebitda if ev_ebitda is not None else float('nan')),
    ('EV / EBIT', ev_ebit if ev_ebit is not None else float('nan')),
    ('LPA', lpa),
    ('VPA', vpa),
    ('Marg. Bruta', round(marg_bruta,4) if marg_bruta is not None else None),
    ('Marg. EBIT', round(marg_ebit,4) if marg_ebit is not None else None),
    ('Marg. L\u00edquida', round(marg_liquida,4) if marg_liquida is not None else None),
    ('EBIT / Ativo', round(ebit_ativo,4) if ebit_ativo is not None else None),
    ('ROIC', round(roic,4) if roic is not None else None),
    ('ROE', round(roe,4) if roe is not None else None),
    ('Liquidez Corr', liquidez_corr),
    ('Div Br/ Patrim', div_br_patrim),
    ('Giro Ativos', giro_ativos),
]
for name,val in indicators_map:
    indicators.append({'indicator': name, 'value': float(val) if (val is not None and not (isinstance(val, float) and (val!=val))) else None})

import json
print('\nJSON_OUTPUT_BEGIN')
print(json.dumps({'indicators': indicators}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))
print('JSON_OUTPUT_END')
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
